candidates.why: Primary operating revenue line; forms the main insurance revenue component of Total income. Other candidate is a narrower ancillary revenue line and Balancing Item - Revenue is an adjustment, not core revenue.
Represents other business-related revenue but is supplementary vs core insurance revenue; less appropriate as main top-line.
Explicitly labeled as a balancing item, not an economic revenue line; should not be used as REVT.

variables.notes: Chose core insurance revenue as top-line; total income aggregates several categories, but the most standard primary revenue line available is Insurance revenue.
No suitable cost of goods sold / direct cost line is provided in the candidate list.

candidates.why: Generic operating expense bucket that likely includes overhead, but there are more granular SG&A-type components available (Personnel expenses, Other operating expenses) and an explicit SG&A label; per rules, prefer components over totals.
Mixed income/expense line; not a pure SG&A overhead expense component and thus less suitable for XSGA.
Classic SG&A overhead component (staff costs) and should be included as part of XSGA.
Typical SG&A overhead bucket besides personnel; belongs in XSGA.
Explicit SG&A label; although preview values are empty, rules say still prefer explicit SG&A rows and include them along with other overhead buckets when not fully populated.

variables.notes: Followed rule to prefer explicit SG&A label plus component overhead rows over generic totals. Excluded broad 'Operating expenses' to avoid double-counting totals when components exist.
No R&D-related line appears in the candidate list; treated as non-existent for this mapping.

candidates.why: Explicit interest expense arising from banking activities; belongs in XINT.

candidates.row_label: Interest expenses securities issued and other interest expenses
candidates.why: Core interest expense on issued securities and other interest; should be included in XINT.

candidates.row_label: Interest expenses securities issued and other interest expenses - remaining
candidates.why: Component/remaining portion of securities-related interest expense; also part of total interest cost.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities
candidates.why: Interest portion of lease liabilities; part of total interest expense.
Generic interest expense line (non-banking, non-lease specific); should be included in total interest expense.

candidates.row_label: Share of profit for the period - non-controlling interests
candidates.why: Represents allocation of profit to non-controlling interests, not an interest expense; should not be mapped to XINT.
Same as above, allocation of profit to minority interests, not interest expense.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities - Supplemental
candidates.why: Supplemental disclosure of lease interest; also part of interest expense.
Equity component, not an interest expense; should not be used for XINT.
Equity component for minority interests, not interest expense.

final_choice.row_label: Interest expenses securities issued and other interest expenses
Interest expenses securities issued and other interest expenses - remaining
Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities
Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities - Supplemental

variables.notes: Included all pure interest expense lines (banking, securities, generic, and lease-related). Excluded non-controlling/minority interest items which are equity allocations, not interest.

candidates.why: Appears to be an income-statement-type item related to equity-accounted profits, not total equity; unsuitable as BE.
Component of equity (likely retained/other reserves), not total book equity; better to use a total equity line.
Explicit equity total (likely parent shareholders’ equity). Appropriate candidate for book equity, but there is also a broader 'Total equity' including minorities.
Overall equity including non-controlling interests (matches reconciliation with total liabilities and equity). Fits definition of total book equity.
Balancing adjustment, not the substantive equity figure; should not be used.

candidates.row_label: Balancing Item - Total Liability and Equity
candidates.why: Balancing row, not the main total; should not be used as BE.
Sum of equity and liabilities, not equity alone; not appropriate for BE.

variables.notes: Chose the comprehensive equity total including non-controlling interests as book equity, consistent with the label 'Total equity' that ties to total assets.

candidates.row_label: Share of profit for the period - non-controlling interests
candidates.why: Flows measure of profit attributable to non-controlling interests; relevant for income attribution but not the balance sheet minority interest stock.
Likely same concept as share of profit to minorities; again a flow, not the equity balance of minorities.

candidates.row_label: Minority portion of consolidated mutual funds
candidates.why: Represents minority share in mutual funds; more of a liability-like item than standard equity minority interest; less ideal for MIB.
Standard label for equity attributable to minority shareholders; best representation of minority interest in equity.
Alternative label for minority interest; similar concept but potentially duplicative with 'Non-controlling interests'.

variables.notes: Mapped MIB to the balance sheet equity line for non-controlling interests, which is the standard minority interest stock measure.
